content.content:
140	pub trait FsAuditLogger: Send + Sync {
141	    fn emit(&self, event: FsCallEvent) -> Result<(), OrbitError>;
142	}
143	
144	#[derive(Clone, Default)]
145	pub struct ToolContext {
146	    pub cwd: Option<String>,
147	    /// If non-empty, only tools in this list may be called. Empty means unrestricted.
148	    pub allowed_tools: Vec<String>,
149	    /// When set, fs tools enforce that all paths resolve inside this directory.
150	    /// Symlink escapes are blocked because paths are canonicalized before the check.
151	    /// If `None`, fs tools deny all access (fail-closed). The runtime pipeline
152	    /// auto-populates this from the data root's parent directory.
153	    pub workspace_root: Option<PathBuf>,
154	    /// Normalized agent name (e.g. `"claude"`). When set, GitHub tools auto-append
155	    /// an attribution footer to PR bodies and review comments.
156	    pub agent_name: Option<String>,
157	    /// Resolved model identifier (e.g. `"opus-4.6"`). Used alongside `agent_name`
158	    /// for the attribution footer.
159	    pub model_name: Option<String>,
160	    /// Program allowlist for `proc.spawn`. When non-empty, `proc.spawn` rejects
161	    /// any program not in this list. Empty means unrestricted.
162	    pub proc_allowed_programs: Vec<String>,
163	    /// Filesystem policy engine used by Orbit-managed agent runtimes.
164	    pub policy_engine: Option<Arc<PolicyEngine>>,
165	    /// Active activity fsProfile name. `None` bypasses fsProfile checks.
166	    pub fs_profile: Option<String>,
167	    /// Optional audit hook for emitting per-fs-call envelope events.
168	    pub fs_audit: Option<Arc<dyn FsAuditLogger>>,
169	    /// Narrow Orbit application host used by Orbit builtins instead of respawning
170	    /// the Orbit CLI or carrying task-specific state in the generic tool context.
171	    pub orbit_host: Option<Arc<dyn OrbitToolHost>>,
172	    /// Optional Groundhog runner host used by the Groundhog verb tools.
173	    pub groundhog_host: Option<Arc<dyn GroundhogToolHost>>,
174	}
175	
176	impl std::fmt::Debug for ToolContext {
177	    fn fmt(&self, f: &mut std::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> std::fmt::Result {
178	        f.debug_struct("ToolContext")
179	            .field("cwd", &self.cwd)
180	            .field("allowed_tools", &self.allowed_tools)
181	            .field("workspace_root", &self.workspace_root)
182	            .field("agent_name", &self.agent_name)
183	            .field("model_name", &self.model_name)
184	            .field("proc_allowed_programs", &self.proc_allowed_programs)
185	            .field("has_policy_engine", &self.policy_engine.is_some())
186	            .field("fs_profile", &self.fs_profile)
187	            .field("has_orbit_host", &self.orbit_host.is_some())
188	            .field("has_groundhog_host", &self.groundhog_host.is_some())
189	            .finish()
190	    }
191	}
192	
193	pub trait Tool: Send + Sync {
194	    fn schema(&self) -> ToolSchema;
195	    fn execute(&self, ctx: &ToolContext, input: Value) -> Result<Value, OrbitError>;
196	}

file.content:
fs_profile: Option<&str>,
        fs_audit: Option<Arc<dyn FsAuditLogger>>,
    ) -> ToolContext {
        let workspace_root = self
            .paths()
            .repo_root
            .canonicalize()
            .unwrap_or_else(|_| self.paths().repo_root.clone());

        ToolContext {
            cwd: std::env::current_dir()
                .ok()
                .map(|cwd| cwd.to_string_lossy().into_owned()),
            workspace_root: Some(workspace_root),
            policy_engine: Some(Arc::new(self.policy_engine().clone())),
            fs_profile: Some(fs_profile.unwrap_or(UNRESTRICTED_FS_PROFILE).to_string()),
            fs_audit,
            orbit_host: Some(build_orbit_tool_host(self, None)),
            ..Default::default()
        }
